description: Genius of Liberty PUBLISHED BY THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE OF THE ILLINOIS ANTISLAVERY SOCIETY We hold these truths to be selfevident that all men are created equal and endowed by their Creator with certain inalienable rights that among these are life liberty and the pursuit of bappin LOWELL LA SALLE COUNTY ILLINOIS SATURDAY OCTOBER 23 1841 Vol I H WARREN Z EASTMAN Editors and Publishing Agents TermsTwo Dollars per annum in advance Subscriptions for six months will be received at the same rate 07 Advertisements will be inserted at the usual prices All letters must be directed post paid to the Editors of the Genius of Liberty Vermil ionvtlle La Salle County Illinois 07 Postmasters are authorised to enclose money for subscribers in letters to Publishers of newspapers and frank the same if signed by themselves AGENTS The following persons are authorized to re ceive subscriptions for the Genius of Liberty ILLINOIS Madison Durley Florid Putnam Co James G Dunlavy Union Grove u Samuel It Lewis Magnolia u James G Laughlin Granville 44 Rev O Lovejoy Princeton Bureau Elder Henry Headly Lamoille 44 Thomas Strong Seybo Ids Mills La Salle John Beeson Vermilionville u Elder R B Ashley Plainfield Will Rev
